title: CTOV - Floralis Compat
description: Compatibility datapack between ChoiceTheorem's overhauled village and Floralis mod
body:
Add this datapack to the game to add compatibility between CTOV and Floralis. You will find flower farms/cactus in village. 1.20+ datapack is for Forge. 

**Floralis mod**

Floralis mod  can be obtained from [here](https://modrinth.com/mod/floralis)

**CTOV mod**

CTOV mod can be obtained from [here](https://modrinth.com/mod/ct-overhaul-village)
